content.full_text:
July 15, 2008

Neal Simpson, MD
220 North San Jacinto
Hemet, CA 92543

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-116

Dear Dr. Simpson:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of July 14, 2008, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll free at 866-275-3772.

Sincerely,

[signature]
Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division
